ddls:
CREATE TABLE "books" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book */,
  "accession_number" INTEGER /* Accession number of the book */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the book */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who wrote the book */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publisher of the book */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the book was published */,
  "call_number_1" TEXT /* First call number of the book */,
  "call_number_2" TEXT /* Second call number of the book */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the book */,
  "edition" TEXT /* Edition number of the book */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the book */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Publication date of the book */,
  "pages" INTEGER /* Number of pages in the book */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary or abstract of the book */,
  "cover_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the book's cover image */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the book record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_publisher_id FOREIGN KEY ("publisher_id") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the author */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the author's website or social media */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email of the author */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the author */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the author */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Death date of the author (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "publisher_name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the publisher's website */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email of the publisher */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the publisher */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the publisher */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the publisher was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the department */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the department */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_departments" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id", "department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., student, faculty, librarian) */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (e.g., student, faculty, librarian) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the user belongs to */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* User's account status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "borrowings" (
  "borrowing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each borrowing event */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book being borrowed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user borrowing the book */,
  "borrow_date" TEXT /* Date the book was borrowed */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the book is due for return */,
  "actual_return_date" TEXT /* Actual date the book was returned */,
  "fine_amount" REAL /* Fine amount if the book was returned late */,
  "borrowing_status" TEXT /* Status of the borrowing (e.g., borrowed, returned, overdue) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("borrowing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_borrowings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_borrowings_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_formats" (
  "book_format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book format */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the book (e.g., hardcover, paperback, e-book) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_formats_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "catalogs" (
  "catalog_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each catalog entry */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book */,
  "isbn" TEXT /* ISBN of the book */,
  "edition" TEXT /* Edition number of the book */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the catalog entry was updated */,
  "cataloger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the librarian who cataloged the book */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("catalog_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_catalogs_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_catalogs_cataloger_id FOREIGN KEY ("cataloger_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the book (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "helpful_count" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review helpful */,
  "unhelpful_count" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review unhelpful */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., approved, pending, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_reviews_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book being tagged */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Text of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_tags_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)
